positive: A whimsical, highly stylized forest creature, resembling a bioluminescent fox mixed with a fox mask, standing amidst detailed tropical flora. The creature has sleek, glowing blue-green fur and large, expressive amber eyes. It is surrounded by oversized, stylized jungle leaves and glowing mushrooms. Full body shot, centralized composition, perfect for a graphic t-shirt print. Silhouette should be strong and clean against a subtly gradient background. Art style: high-contrast, Neo-Art Nouveau meets Studio Ghibli digital painting. Lighting: Cinematic, dramatic backlighting emphasizing the bioluminescence and edges. Color palette: Deep indigo, emerald green, sapphire blue, and glowing gold accents. Vector art quality, clean lines, suitable for merchandise print.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifact, grain, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, out of frame, multiple subjects, bad anatomy, cropped, poorly drawn hands, extra limbs, messy, messy background
